eurostat.name: Eurostat
eurostat.description: Statistical office of the EU. Covers demographics, economy, employment, trade, agriculture and environment for 27 member states and associated countries. Primary source for European comparative statistics.

comext.name: Eurostat Comext
comext.description: Eurostat's reference database for detailed statistics on international trade in goods (ITG). Covers EU and non-EU trade by CN8 product codes since 1988. Also includes PRODCOM manufacturing data. Dataset IDs are prefixed DS-. Full dataset download is disabled by the API — dimension filters are required.

istat.name: ISTAT
istat.description: Italian National Institute of Statistics. Covers population, economy, employment, prices and social indicators for Italy. Main source for Italian official statistics.

ecb.name: European Central Bank
ecb.description: ECB Statistical Data Warehouse. Covers monetary policy, banking supervision, exchange rates, balance of payments and financial statistics for the euro area.

oecd.name: OECD
oecd.description: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development. Covers education, health, tax, trade, environment and social indicators across 38 member countries. Strong on cross-country comparisons.

insee.name: INSEE
insee.description: French National Institute of Statistics and Economic Studies. Covers French population, economy, employment, prices and social indicators via the BDM macro-economic time series database.

bundesbank.name: Deutsche Bundesbank
bundesbank.description: German central bank time series database. Covers monetary statistics, banking, financial markets, exchange rates and German macroeconomic indicators.

worldbank.name: World Bank
worldbank.description: World Development Indicators and other World Bank datasets. Covers 200+ countries with 1400+ indicators on development, poverty, health, education and environment.

abs.name: Australian Bureau of Statistics
abs.description: Official Australian statistics. Covers population, economy, employment, trade, prices and environment for Australia and its territories.

bis.name: Bank for International Settlements
bis.description: The bank for central banks. Global financial statistics: international credit, debt securities, exchange rates, banking flows, derivatives and property prices. Data contributed by 63 central banks worldwide.

imf.name: International Monetary Fund
imf.description: IMF statistical databases. Includes the World Economic Outlook (WEO) with GDP growth, inflation and fiscal forecasts for 190+ countries; Balance of Payments; Financial Soundness Indicators; and more. Use dataflow WEO with agency IMF.RES for WEO data. Country codes: ISO alpha-3 (USA, DEU, JPN).

derzhstat.name: Derzhstat
derzhstat.description: State Statistics Service of Ukraine. Covers prices, wages, demographics, agriculture, trade and national accounts for Ukraine. 112+ dataflows. Requires browser-like User-Agent (server blocks library UAs). Data URL key-filter notation not supported — period filtering via query params only.
